name: Ajman (United Arab Emirates)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic colour of the hoist band, distinguishing Ajman from the other emirates
the traditional colour of the historical Trucial States flag

description: A red field with a vertical white band along the hoist taking up about a quarter of the flag's width.
history: Ajman, one of the seven emirates of the United Arab Emirates, retained its red field with white hoist after federation in 1971; the flag is flown alongside the federal UAE flag.
